issues.description: TrashFromHand with excludeSelf:true is contradictory. The ability says 'trash this Character' (self), not trash from hand. Should use TrashSelf or similar mechanism.
Condition 'If you have 2 or less Life cards' is missing. Should be a condition gate before the KO/Draw actions, not an unconditional trash.
Second effect (trigger:Trigger with KO action) is extraneous and has no correspondence to the card text. Should be removed.

DrawCard should only execute if the KO action succeeded or as part of the sequence. Text says 'Then, draw 1 card' implying it happens after the optional KO, but current structure may not enforce proper sequencing.
